texto: What I'm primarily responsible for is products. Everything is developed with my personal involvement. Second is client communication. Everything to do with product and consumer is my primary focus. I also deal with everything which relates to investment and partnership. Distribution, finance, administration, I don't do.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Roustam Tariko sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “What I'm primarily responsible for is products. Everything is developed with my personal involvem…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, focus, finance, útil em momentos de finance e partnership.
